title: Final Statistics 2011 Edition (2009 tax year) - Canada.ca
content:
## Final Statistics 2011 Edition (2009 tax year)

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
The Final Statistics presents data from personal income returns that were processed for the tax year two years prior to year of publication. For example, the 2011 edition of the tables analyze returns from the 2009 tax year, which generally had to be filed by the end of April 2010. The 2011 edition of final statistics are based on 100% of all returns up to the cut-off date of June 30, 2011. These data contain the most recent 2009 tax year assessment or reassessment up to the cut-off date
- Major changes for the 2009 tax year
- Major classification variables
- Description of items
- Description of final tables

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
